subcodes.first_line: Consort with all the people in love and fragrance. Fellowship is the cause of unity... Oneness, in its true significance…
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @superstition
